company.name: DeMar Transportation
company.legalName: DeMar Consulting Group LLC dba DeMar Transportation
differentiators: Asset-based carrier plus licensed broker — one partner, maximum capacity options
Safety-first culture with DOT compliance and excellent safety ratings
24/7 availability with US-based, English-speaking drivers and team
Transparent communication and competitive rates on every load
Nationwide coverage across dry van, reefer, flatbed, hazmat, and last-mile solutions

doSay: Asset-based carrier with broker authority — more options for every load
Safety-first on every mile, every shipment
24/7 service with a US-based team you can reach
Dry van, reefer, flatbed, hazmat — we have the equipment
One call connects you to our fleet and our network
voice.personality: DeMar Transportation is the partner that shows up — professional, plain-spoken, and relentless about safety and reliability. We don't oversell; we deliver. Whether you need a single flatbed or a full logistics solution, we bring the same no-nonsense commitment to every conversation.

visual.imageStyle: High-contrast photography of trucks on open highways and loading docks, emphasizing scale and motion. Dark navy overlays at 70-80% opacity over hero images to ensure text legibility. Clean, utilitarian aesthetic — no lifestyle fluff, real freight in real conditions.
visual.iconStyle: Lucide React outline icons in accent yellow (#FBBC18) against dark navy backgrounds for feature callouts; white icons on colored backgrounds for service cards. Consistent 24px or 48px sizing, never decorative.

linkedin.postStyle: Lead with a single bold insight or stat on line 1 (no hashtags above the fold). 3-5 short paragraphs max. End with a clear CTA — quote request, phone number, or question to drive comments. Use line breaks liberally; no walls of text. Occasional native document or carousel for service explainers.
contentPillars: Safety culture and DOT compliance insights
Freight market trends and capacity updates
Service explainers (what's the right equipment for your load?)
Team and driver spotlights — the people behind the trucks
Shipper tips — how to reduce costs and improve transit times
Company milestones, lane expansions, and new capabilities
